mapper.select: select * from task where task_id = #{taskId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into task(user_id, title, content, category, priority, deadline, status, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{priority}, #{deadline}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: delete from task where task_id = #{taskId} and user_id = #{userId}
